title: newtonia nitida
intro: Newtonia nitida is a plant species native to tropical Africa, commonly known as the 'Togo apple'. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Newtonia nitida has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating malaria, and aiding in the management of respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, decoctions, and infusions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
